history.notes: First honest published run. Agent: claude-agent-sdk via OAuth keychain (Claude Max subscription, no API key). Grader role: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6, also via OAuth. Conditions: --no-sandbox (Docker not installed), --limit 1 (single AKS sample). Score 0.0 reflects two known degradations documented on the page: (1) no-sandbox means Kusto emulator + MITRE service tools fail at the network layer so execute_kql_query was never called → C2 Jaccard 0.0, C3 0/0 attempts; (2) the grader's LLM-as-judge (C0 + C4 detection quality) hit Anthropic rate limits on the OAuth/subscription path with 25-30 min retry delays per call, so those two checkpoints are marked null rather than 0. Mythos's published 0.624-0.685 range is on CTI-REALM-50 with sandbox + dedicated API access — direct comparison is not apples-to-apples until those degradations close.
